evals.prompt: I have a LangChain agent that calls several tools. I want to track which tool calls are getting stuck. How do I add agent-pulse?
evals.expected_output: Provides a LangChain callback handler that integrates with agent-pulse, with setup instructions and usage example

evals.prompt: Set up agent-pulse hooks in my Claude Code project so I can see what tools the agent is using, and also set up a /loop to alert me if anything goes stale
evals.expected_output: Provides Claude Code hooks config for .claude/settings.json and /loop examples for monitoring stale runs

evals.prompt: I'm building an OpenClaw plugin and want automatic observability for all exec tool calls. What's the easiest setup?
evals.expected_output: Recommends the plugin hooks approach with the config.json setup for automatic before_tool_call/after_tool_call tracking
